login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your restaurant command center

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Set up in minutes — pick a plan after onboarding
signup.name: Your name
signup.orgNumberHint: Required for VAT-compliant invoicing. 10 digits, e.g. 556677-8899.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: We'll send a reset link to your email
forgot.sent: Reset link sent! Check your email.

verifyHandle.missingToken: This confirmation link is missing its token. It may have already been used or copied incorrectly. Try signing in again or request a new link.

verifySent.title: Check your inbox
verifySent.body: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to activate your account and pick up where you left off.
verifySent.deliveryWarn: Email delivery is currently unavailable. Please contact hello@comandcenter.se if your link doesn't arrive within a few minutes.
verifySent.checkSpam: If you don't see the email within a minute or two, check your spam folder.

reset.title: Set new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a strong password for your account.
reset.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
reset.linkExpired: Reset link expired. Please request a new one.
